sections.paragraph:
ἀποϰτείνω/ἀποϰτέννω [ἀπό, ϰτείνω ‘kill, murder’; intensive form ‘kill off] ‘put an end by force to existence of someone/something’, kill

—a. of bodily life Mt 14:5; 21:35; Lk 12:4; Ac 3:15.

—b.of life transcending bodily existence Mt 10:28; Ro 7:11.

—c. of an abstract entity, hostility Eph 2:16.
